power.method: DC 48V / AC 24V / High PoE 60W; 50 W (PoE, heater, fan and IR on), 62 W (AC, heater, fan and IR on)

features: zoom lens: 33x optical zoom, 16x digital zoom

built-in analytics: Basic Face Detection, Object Based Motion Detection, Tampering Detection, Shock Detection, PTZ Auto Tracking, Object Line Crossing Detection, Object Enter Area Detection, Missing Object Detection, ...
detection range: detection: 90m-2970m, observation: 36.3m-1197.6m, recognition: 18m-594m, identification: 9m-297m
ONVIF Compliant: Yes, Profile S, Profile G, Profile T, Profile Q, Profile M* (To be available through future firmware upgrade)

home_assistant.notes: Use ONVIF integration. RTSP port is 7070 by default.

blue_iris.notes: Select 'ACTi' profile. Default RTSP port is 7070.
